Let me draft the corrected query:

PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>

SELECT (MAX(?duration_minutes) AS ?max_duration)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?series {
    wd:Q3511178    # 1975 ALCS
    wd:Q14870260    # 2013 ALCS
    wd:Q56692089    # 2018 World Series
  }
  ?series wdt:P527 ?game .       # Game is part of the series
  ?game wdt:P710 wd:Q213959 .   # Boston Red Sox participated
  ?game wdt:P2047 ?duration_q . # Correct duration property
  ?duration_q wikibase:quantityAmount ?amount .
  ?duration_q wikibase:quantityUnit ?unit .
  
  # Only consider time units we understand
  FILTER(?unit IN (wd:Q2529, wd:Q712226, wd:Q11573))
  
  # Convert duration to minutes
  BIND(IF(?unit = wd:Q2529, ?amount * 60,       # hours to minutes
        IF(?unit = wd:Q712226, ?amount,         # already minutes
          IF(?unit = wd:Q11573, ?amount / 60, 0) # seconds to minutes
        )) AS ?duration_minutes)
}
ORDER BY DESC(?duration_minutes)
LIMIT 1

This should capture the duration in minutes and return the maximum.
